extensions.name: spoiler
extensions.author: changerawr
extensions.description: Add collapsible spoiler blocks with customizable titles, colors, and icons. Supports named colors, hex codes, custom icons, and tables!

extensions.name: highlight
extensions.author: changerawr
extensions.description: Highlight text with hex colors. Pick from 7 presets or choose any custom color.

extensions.name: unsplash
extensions.author: changerawr
extensions.description: Browse and insert high-quality images from Unsplash directly into your markdown. Requires free Unsplash API key.
